mcp_server.name: OP_PRODUCT_0002/_ProductEWMWarehouse
mcp_server.description: SAP EWM Product Master - Warehouse View. Provides read access to EWM product master data including cycle counting indicators, counting frequency/interval, last physical inventory date, and warehouse assignment.
mcp_server.note: Customer-deployed on-premise MCP server. Tool schemas must be validated against the deployed instance. The tools below are derived from the OP_PRODUCT_0002 OData service structure.

tools.name: list_ProductEWMWarehouse
tools.title: List EWM Warehouse Products
tools.description: Retrieves EWM warehouse view of product master records. Returns cycle counting indicator (CycleCountingIndicator), physical inventory cycle (PhysicalInventoryCycle/interval), last physical inventory date (LastPhysicalInventoryDate), product number, and warehouse number. Use $filter for warehouse and CCI filtering. Use $top to limit results (max 100).

$filter.description: OData filter expression, e.g. "WarehouseNumber eq '0001'" or "WarehouseNumber eq '0001' and CycleCountingIndicator eq 'A'"

$select.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

$top.description: Maximum number of records to return (max 100)

$skip.description: Number of records to skip for pagination
